description: For malicious files, the vendor that made the decision.
examples:
Command Example
crowdstrike-scan file=59e17f98cef7dd1bf4fb791eb1dcd0cea6dd870b6e36af7c37bd732c84d43355
Context Example
{
"DBotScore": {
"Vendor": "CrowdStrike Falcon Sandbox",
"Indicator": "59e17f98cef7dd1bf4fb791eb1dcd0cea6dd870b6e36af7c37bd732c84d43355",
"Score": 3,
name: crowdstrike-scan

outputs.description: The SHA-256 hash of the file. File.SHA1 The SHA-1 hash of the file.
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: The MD5 hash of the file. File.environmentId The environment ID of the file.
outputs.name: File.MD5

outputs.description: The analysis start time of the file. File.submitname The submission name of the file.
outputs.name: File.analysis_start_time

outputs.description: A list of classification tags of the file. File.vxfamily The family classification of the file.
outputs.name: File.classification_tags

outputs.description: The total network connections of the file. File.total_processes The total processes count of the file.
outputs.name: File.total_network_connections

outputs.description: The total signatures count if the file. File.hosts A list of the file’s hosts.
outputs.name: File.total_signatures

outputs.description: If the server found this file interesting. File.domains A list of the file’s related domains.
outputs.name: File.isinteresting

outputs.description: Whether the file was analyzed by URL. File.Malicious.Vendor or malicious files, the vendor that made the decision.
outputs.name: File.isurlanalysis

outputs.description: For malicious files, the reason for the vendor to make the decision. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: The actual score. File.hash The hash used to query the file.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score

outputs.description: The state of the file test.
outputs.name: File.state
